SELECT e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.refresh_token, e0.refresh_token_expiry, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at
    FROM employees AS e
    ORDER BY e.employee_id
    LIMIT @p1 OFFSET @p
) AS e0
INNER JOIN roles AS r ON e0.role_id = r.role_id

SELECT n1.notification_id, n1.created_at, n1.employee_id, n1.is_read, n1.message, n1.notification_type_id, n1.reference_complaint_id, n1.title, n0.notification_type_id, n0.notification_type_name

    FROM notifications AS n
    WHERE n.employee_id = @employeeId
    ORDER BY n.created_at DESC

) AS n1

    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id

LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at

) AS c1

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.refresh_token, e0.refresh_token_expiry, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at

) AS c1

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.refresh_token, e0.refresh_token_expiry, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.refresh_token, e0.refresh_token_expiry, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.escalation_due_at

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at0, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at0
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4) AND (lower(c.complaint_title) LIKE @searchLower_contains OR lower(c.complaint_description) LIKE @searchLower_contains0 OR lower(e.employee_name) LIKE @searchLower_contains1)
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p5 OFFSET @p
) AS s
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON s.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON s.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON s.category_id = c1.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON s.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY s.escalation_due_at

) AS c1

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.refresh_token AS refresh_token0, e0.refresh_token_expiry AS refresh_token_expiry0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id

    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s

FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id

LEFT JOIN roles AS r ON c.role_id_at_action_time = r.role_id

    FROM complaints AS c

    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.refresh_token AS refresh_token0, e0.refresh_token_expiry AS refresh_token_expiry0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id

    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.status_id AS status_id0, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id AS priority_id0, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c1.category_id AS category_id0, c1.category_name, c1.created_at AS created_at0, c1.default_priority_id, c1.department_id, c1.is_active, c1.sla_hours, c1.updated_at AS updated_at0, d.department_id AS department_id0, d.created_at AS created_at1, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active AS is_active0, d.updated_at AS updated_at1, e.employee_id, e.created_at AS created_at2, e.department_id AS department_id1, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active AS is_active1, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at AS updated_at2, e0.employee_id AS employee_id0, e0.created_at AS created_at3, e0.department_id AS department_id2, e0.email AS email0, e0.employee_name AS employee_name0, e0.is_active AS is_active2, e0.mobile_number AS mobile_number0, e0.password_hash AS password_hash0, e0.refresh_token AS refresh_token0, e0.refresh_token_expiry AS refresh_token_expiry0, e0.role_id AS role_id0, e0.updated_at AS updated_at3
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.status_id = c0.status_id
    INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
    INNER JOIN categories AS c1 ON c.category_id = c1.category_id
    INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c1.department_id = d.department_id
    INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
    LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
    WHERE c.complaint_id = @id
    LIMIT 1
) AS s
LEFT JOIN complaint_attachments AS c2 ON s.complaint_id = c2.complaint_id
ORDER BY s.complaint_id, s.status_id0, s.priority_id0, s.category_id0, s.department_id0, s.employee_id, s.employee_id0

FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.category_id AS category_id0, c0.category_name, c0.created_at AS created_at0, c0.default_priority_id, c0.department_id, c0.is_active, c0.sla_hours, c0.updated_at AS updated_at0
    FROM complaints AS c
    INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4) AND c0.department_id = @departmentId_Value
    ORDER BY c.escalation_due_at
    LIMIT @p3 OFFSET @p
) AS s
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON s.status_id = c1.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON s.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON s.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON s.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON s.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY s.escalation_due_at

SELECT c.history_id, c.changed_by, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.escalation_level_snapshot, c.new_handler_employee_id, c.new_status_id, c.old_handler_employee_id, c.old_status_id, c.remarks, c.role_id_at_action_time, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, c1.status_id, c1.is_terminal, c1.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.refresh_token, e0.refresh_token_expiry, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, e1.employee_id, e1.created_at, e1.department_id, e1.email, e1.employee_name, e1.is_active, e1.mobile_number, e1.password_hash, e1.refresh_token, e1.refresh_token_expiry, e1.role_id, e1.updated_at, r.role_id, r.created_at, r.role_name
FROM complaint_history AS c
LEFT JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c.old_status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c1 ON c.new_status_id = c1.status_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.old_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.new_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.changed_by = e1.employee_id
LEFT JOIN roles AS r ON c.role_id_at_action_time = r.role_id
WHERE c.complaint_id = @complaintId

SELECT c1.request_id, c1.complaint_id, c1.created_at, c1.remarks, c1.request_status_id, c1.request_type_id, c1.requested_by, c1.reviewed_at, c1.reviewed_by, c0.complaint_id, c0.category_id, c0.closed_at, c0.complaint_description, c0.complaint_title, c0.created_at, c0.current_handler_employee_id, c0.escalation_due_at, c0.escalation_level, c0.priority_id, c0.raised_by_employee_id, c0.reopened_count, c0.resolved_at, c0.status_id, c0.updated_at, r.request_type_id, r.request_type_name, r0.request_status_id, r0.status_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.refresh_token, e0.refresh_token_expiry, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.request_id, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.remarks, c.request_status_id, c.request_type_id, c.requested_by, c.reviewed_at, c.reviewed_by
    FROM complaint_requests AS c
    WHERE c.request_type_id = @requestTypeId_Value
    ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaints AS c0 ON c1.complaint_id = c0.complaint_id
INNER JOIN request_types AS r ON c1.request_type_id = r.request_type_id
INNER JOIN request_statuses AS r0 ON c1.request_status_id = r0.request_status_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.requested_by = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

    FROM complaints AS c

SELECT c.escalation_id, c.complaint_id, c.escalated_at, c.escalated_by_employee_id, c.escalated_to_employee_id, c.escalation_level, c.escalation_rule_id, c.reason, e.escalation_rule_id, e.category_id, e.escalate_after_hours, e.escalation_level, e.priority_id, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.refresh_token, e0.refresh_token_expiry, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at, e1.employee_id, e1.created_at, e1.department_id, e1.email, e1.employee_name, e1.is_active, e1.mobile_number, e1.password_hash, e1.refresh_token, e1.refresh_token_expiry, e1.role_id, e1.updated_at
FROM complaint_escalations AS c
LEFT JOIN escalation_rules AS e ON c.escalation_rule_id = e.escalation_rule_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c.escalated_by_employee_id = e0.employee_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e1 ON c.escalated_to_employee_id = e1.employee_id

FROM (
    SELECT c.request_id, c.complaint_id, c.created_at, c.remarks, c.request_status_id, c.request_type_id, c.requested_by, c.reviewed_at, c.reviewed_by
    FROM complaint_requests AS c
    WHERE c.request_type_id = @requestTypeId_Value
    ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaints AS c0 ON c1.complaint_id = c0.complaint_id
INNER JOIN request_types AS r ON c1.request_type_id = r.request_type_id
INNER JOIN request_statuses AS r0 ON c1.request_status_id = r0.request_status_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.requested_by = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.reviewed_by = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id

SELECT c.category_id AS "CategoryId", c0.category_name AS "CategoryName", d.department_name AS "DepartmentName", count(*)::int AS "ComplaintCount"
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c0.department_id = d.department_id
GROUP BY c.category_id, c0.category_name, d.department_name

    SELECT e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.refresh_token, e0.refresh_token_expiry, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.created_at DESC

SELECT c1.complaint_id, c1.category_id, c1.closed_at, c1.complaint_description, c1.complaint_title, c1.created_at, c1.current_handler_employee_id, c1.escalation_due_at, c1.escalation_level, c1.priority_id, c1.raised_by_employee_id, c1.reopened_count, c1.resolved_at, c1.status_id, c1.updated_at, c0.status_id, c0.is_terminal, c0.status_name, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, c2.category_id, c2.category_name, c2.created_at, c2.default_priority_id, c2.department_id, c2.is_active, c2.sla_hours, c2.updated_at, d.department_id, d.created_at, d.department_head_employee_id, d.department_name, d.is_active, d.updated_at, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at, e0.employee_id, e0.created_at, e0.department_id, e0.email, e0.employee_name, e0.is_active, e0.mobile_number, e0.password_hash, e0.refresh_token, e0.refresh_token_expiry, e0.role_id, e0.updated_at
FROM (
    SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, CASE
        WHEN c.escalation_due_at IS NULL THEN TIMESTAMPTZ 'infinity'
        ELSE c.escalation_due_at
    END AS c
    FROM complaints AS c
    WHERE c.current_handler_employee_id = @employeeId AND c.status_id IN (2, 3, 4)
    ORDER BY CASE
        WHEN c.escalation_due_at IS NULL THEN TIMESTAMPTZ 'infinity'
        ELSE c.escalation_due_at
    END
    LIMIT @p2 OFFSET @p
) AS c1
INNER JOIN complaint_statuses AS c0 ON c1.status_id = c0.status_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c1.priority_id = p.priority_id
INNER JOIN categories AS c2 ON c1.category_id = c2.category_id
INNER JOIN departments AS d ON c2.department_id = d.department_id
INNER JOIN employees AS e ON c1.raised_by_employee_id = e.employee_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e0 ON c1.current_handler_employee_id = e0.employee_id
ORDER BY c1.c

SELECT c.complaint_id, c.category_id, c.closed_at, c.complaint_description, c.complaint_title, c.created_at, c.current_handler_employee_id, c.escalation_due_at, c.escalation_level, c.priority_id, c.raised_by_employee_id, c.reopened_count, c.resolved_at, c.status_id, c.updated_at, c0.category_id, c0.category_name, c0.created_at, c0.default_priority_id, c0.department_id, c0.is_active, c0.sla_hours, c0.updated_at, p.priority_id, p.escalation_order, p.priority_name, e.employee_id, e.created_at, e.department_id, e.email, e.employee_name, e.is_active, e.mobile_number, e.password_hash, e.refresh_token, e.refresh_token_expiry, e.role_id, e.updated_at
FROM complaints AS c
INNER JOIN categories AS c0 ON c.category_id = c0.category_id
INNER JOIN priorities AS p ON c.priority_id = p.priority_id
LEFT JOIN employees AS e ON c.current_handler_employee_id = e.employee_id
WHERE c.escalation_due_at <= now() AND c.status_id <> 6 AND c.status_id <> 7 AND c.status_id <> 9 AND c.status_id <> 5
